_about: Golden eval for TOWN-EVENT retrieval (grounding slice 4) — the doc_type='event' rows that ground NPC dialogue. Kept SEPARATE from the docs golden set (golden.json) so neither corpus pollutes the other. `events` is a synthetic but representative set of town events; each query should retrieve its expected event(s) by semantic similarity (queries are phrased differently from the event text on purpose). Scored offline over evals/events_fixture.npz by evals/events_recall.py — same deterministic, no-model pattern as recall.py.

events.content: [Tick 100] fire — A fire broke out in the market district, destroying two merchant stalls.
[Tick 101] festival — The harvest festival began in the town square with music, dancing, and feasting.
[Tick 102] theft — A thief stole a sack of grain from the warehouse overnight.
[Tick 103] election — Mayor Aldric won the town election by a narrow margin over the miller.
[Tick 104] plague — A sickness spread through the eastern quarter and the clinic filled with the ill.
[Tick 105] flood — Heavy rain flooded the river bank and washed out the southern bridge.
[Tick 106] marriage — The blacksmith and the baker were wed in the chapel at midday.
[Tick 107] bandit_raid — Bandits raided a farmstead on the north road and drove off the livestock.
[Tick 108] market_crash — The price of iron collapsed after a glut, ruining two ore traders.
[Tick 109] tavern_brawl — A drunken brawl broke out in the tavern and a table was smashed.
[Tick 110] birth — A healthy child was born to the weaver's family before dawn.
[Tick 111] drought — Weeks without rain left the wheat fields cracked and the crops failing.

queries.question: Did something burn down near the merchants?
Was there a celebration with music in the town square?
Did anyone steal food from the storehouse?
Who became the new mayor of the town?
Is there illness spreading among the townsfolk?
What damaged the bridge by the river?
Who got married at the chapel?
Were there raiders stealing animals on the farms?
What happened to the price of ore?
Why are the wheat crops failing?
